parameters.Description_ZH: 最高地震風險區（加州、太平洋西北）辦公型振動測試 – Issue 5 更新峰值
parameters.Description_EN: Highest seismic risk zone (California, Pacific NW) – Issue 5 updated peak values
parameters.Horizontal Direction Peak Acceleration: 1.0 g (Issue 5 – revised from 0.5 g in Issue 4)

tests.Condition: Visual and functional baseline
Apply OVM spectrum horizontal X, 30 sec
Apply OVM spectrum horizontal Y, 30 sec
Full functional test; no data loss; no physical damage

parameters.Description_ZH: Zone 4 地震動測試 – 模擬強烈地震的時域加速度波形
parameters.Description_EN: Zone 4 earthquake time-history simulation – major seismic event
parameters.Waveform: Time-history waveform per GR-63 Appendix A (Issue 5)

tests.Condition: Simultaneous X, Y, Z per prescribed time-history
Verify no tip-over, no structural failure, no data loss

parameters.Description_ZH: 低地震風險區辦公型振動 (東部/中部美國)
parameters.Description_EN: Low seismic risk zone OVM – Eastern/Central US

tests.Condition: Apply Zone 1 OVM spectrum per GR-63 Figure 4-1
No physical damage; equipment fully functional

parameters.Description_ZH: 標準電信機房長期運行環境 – Issue 5 擴展至 ASHRAE A2/A3/A4
parameters.Description_EN: Telecom CO long-term operating env – Issue 5 expanded to ASHRAE A2/A3/A4 equipment

parameters.Description_ZH: 緊急短暫超溫運作 – 空調故障期間允許的最大條件
parameters.Description_EN: Emergency short-term excursion – max conditions during HVAC failure

tests.Condition: Operate at 55°C for up to 96 hours
All services must remain operational during excursion

parameters.Description_ZH: 出貨前非機房儲存環境

tests.Condition: Maintain -40°C for 72 hours
Maintain 70°C for 72 hours
Full functional test after returning to ambient

parameters.Description_ZH: 機房設備運作時發出的噪音限制，保護長期值班人員聽力。依據室溫條件嚴格分級。
parameters.Description_EN: Equipment self-emitted noise limits to protect Central Office personnel.
parameters.Limit at Standard Ambient (≤27°C): ≤ 75 dBA Sound Power (Lw) or SPL at 1.0 m
parameters.Office Room Limit: ≤ 65 dBA Limit for typical office environments

tests.Condition: Measure SPL on all 4 sides; must be ≤ 75 dBA

tests.Measurement State: Full Load at Max Rated Temp
tests.Condition: Drive fans to 100%; must be ≤ 85 dBA

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬工廠或都會區受污染的空氣，驗證金屬端子與 PCB 銅箔的抗腐蝕能力。要求極精確的 ppb 等級毒氣混合。
parameters.Description_EN: Simulates polluted urban/industrial air to verify contact and PCB corrosion resistance.

tests.Condition: Maintain exact gas mixture at 30°C and 70% RH for 14 days
Inspect for copper creep corrosion and check contact resistance

parameters.Description_ZH: 極度嚴苛的網通機房防火測試，使用甲烷燃燒器直接從設備下方點火，確保設備不會助燃。
parameters.Description_EN: Severe telecommunications fire spread test. Uses a 30-100kW methane burner to ignite equipment directly.
parameters.Ignition Source: 12-kW to 100-kW Fire test burner placed underneath equipment
parameters.Self-Extinguish Requirement: Flames must self-extinguish within 30 seconds after burner is turned off

tests.Condition: Ignite methane burner at base of equipment for 30 minutes
Flames must not spread to adjacent equipment; smoke must be contained
Fire must self-extinguish < 30 sec after removing gas source

parameters.Description_ZH: 內部組件的針焰與材質防火等級認證。
parameters.Description_EN: Internal component needle-flame and material combustibility ratings.
parameters.PCB / Plastic Material: Must be UL 94 V-0 or better
parameters.Cabling: Must pass UL 1666 vertical tray flame test

tests.Condition: Verify all non-metallic parts are UL 94 V-0 or 5VA rated

parameters.Description_ZH: 設備出貨包裝必須承受物流跌落衝擊
parameters.Description_EN: Shipping package must withstand logistics drop impacts
parameters.Drop Height (< 45 kg): 76 cm (30 inches) – all faces, edges, corners

tests.Condition: 6 faces × 1 drop each
12 edges × 1 drop each
8 corners × 1 drop each
Equipment functional; no visible damage to critical parts

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬卡車和鐵路聯合運輸過程的振動環境
parameters.Description_EN: Combined truck and rail transport vibration simulation

parameters.Description_ZH: 電信機房內設備的電磁干擾發射限制
parameters.Description_EN: EMI emission limits for equipment installed in telecom central offices
parameters.Emission Limit Reference: FCC Part 15 Class A (USA) / CISPR 22 Class A (International)
parameters.ESD Immunity: IEC 61000-4-2, Level 3 (6 kV contact, 8 kV air)

tests.Condition: Per ANSI C63.4 setup; measure 150 kHz to 30 MHz
Per ANSI C63.4 at 3 m or 10 m; measure 30 MHz to 1 GHz
10 contact + 10 air discharges per polarity at each test point
